svg.text: There are problems though. Clicking multiple times quickly will make the player 'fly' up and up. To fix this we need to only allow him to start a jump 'when he is touching the ground'. However, another problem can arise from that assumption. If a player is walking down a slope, then often he will not be touching the ground all the time, but kind of skipping down the slope. This often results in the player missing a jump at a critical point in the game. An improvement therefore is to say that a player can jump 'if he touched the floor very very recently, (even if he is not on the floor right now).
